title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-enhanced mouse pointer that can understand what is being pointed at and explain its relevance. The system reimagines the traditional pointer interface, which has remained largely unchanged for over 50 years, by adding contextual AI capabilities to improve user workflows.
